source_problem: Synthetic report rerun changed only timestamps and left tracked dirt outside active task scope.
why_it_matters: Timestamp-only drift pollutes provenance and blocks clean pass gating.
future_prevention: Add deterministic mode or post-checker auto-restore guard for synthetic report timestamps when semantic payload unchanged.
recommended_next_task_or_matrix_update: Mechanicus candidate script-first checker for timestamp-only drift auto-classification.

source_problem: Taskpack local extraction inside repo creates avoidable untracked runtime drift.
why_it_matters: Runtime staging noise inflates dirty path set and increases fake-green risk.
future_prevention: Route ad-hoc taskpack extraction to outside-repo temp dir or auto-clean after read-order completion.
recommended_next_task_or_matrix_update: Astronomicon intake helper should provide cleanup hook for _TASKPACK_INBOX staging.
